stages.concept:
# Unit 114: 원급과 비교급을 이용한 최상급 표현 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **원급과 비교급으로 최상급 의미를 나타내는 표현**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: 최상급 = 비교급으로 바꿔 쓸 수 있어요!

👩‍🏫 선생님: **비교급 + than any other + 단수명사** — 다른 어떤 ~보다 더 …한 (= 가장)

> She is **the tallest** girl in her class. (최상급)
> = She is **taller than any other** girl in her class. (비교급)
> 그녀는 반에서 가장 키가 큰 소녀이다.

> Mt. Everest is **the highest** mountain in the world.
> = Mt. Everest is **higher than any other** mountain in the world.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **No (other) + 명사 ~ as + 원급 + as** — ~만큼 …한 것은 없다 (= 가장)

> **No other** boy is **as tall as** Tom.
> Tom만큼 키가 큰 소년은 없다. (= Tom이 가장 크다)

👩‍🏫 선생님: **No (other) + 명사 ~ 비교급 + than**

> **Nothing** is **more precious than** health.
> 건강보다 더 소중한 것은 없다. (= 건강이 가장 소중하다)

**Q. 다음 문장의 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 단어의 형태를 고르세요.**
"He is smarter than any other (       ) in this class."
1. student ✅
2. students
3. student's

👩‍🏫 선생님: 맞아요! '비교급 + than any other + 단수명사' 형태를 써야 하므로, 복수형인 students가 아니라 단수형인 student가 와야 한답니다. 빈출 포인트이니 꼭 기억하세요!

🧑‍🎓 학생: 최상급 = 비교급 than any other 단수명사 / No ~ as 원급 as / No ~ 비교급 than! 같은 의미를 세 가지로 표현할 수 있군요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 114: 원급과 비교급 이용한 최상급 표현 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 다음 중 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
서울은 한국에서 가장 붐비는 도시이다.
Seoul is the most crowded city in Korea.
= No other city in Korea is (     ) crowded (     ) Seoul.
> **정답** as, as

---

**02.** Seoul is the most crowded city in Korea.
= No other city in Korea is (     ) than Seoul.
> **정답** more crowded

---

**03.** He is the tallest boy in the class.
= No other boy in the class is (     ) he is.
> **정답** as tall as

---

**04.** She is the smartest student in the school.
= No other student in the school is (     ) her.
> **정답** smarter than

---

**05.** This is the best book I've ever read.
= No other book I've read is (     ) this one.
> **정답** better than (as good as)

---

**06.** 최상급 문장을 원급(as~as)을 이용하여 바꾸시오.
He is the tallest boy in the class.
> **정답** No other boy in the class is as tall as he is.

---

**07.** She is the fastest runner on the team.
> **정답** No other runner on the team is as fast as she is.

---

**08.** This is the most beautiful flower in the garden.
> **정답** No other flower in the garden is as beautiful as this one.

---

**09.** 최상급 문장을 비교급(~than)을 이용하여 바꾸시오.
He is the tallest boy in the class.
> **정답** No other boy in the class is taller than he is.

---

**10.** She is the smartest student in the school.
> **정답** No other student in the school is smarter than she is.

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그는 반에서 가장 키가 큰 소년이다.
= No other boy in the class is he is.
> **정답** as tall as

---

**12.** 그녀는 학교에서 가장 똑똑한 학생이다.
= No other student in the school is she is.
> **정답** smarter than

---

**13.** 이것은 가게에서 가장 비싼 가방이다.
= No other bag in the store is this one.
> **정답** as expensive as

---

**14.** 겨울은 1년 중 가장 추운 계절이다.
= No other season of the year is winter.
> **정답** colder than

---

**15.** 이것은 내가 본 영화 중 가장 재미있다.
= No other movie I've seen is this one.
> **정답** as interesting as (more interesting than)

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
반에서 그보다 키 큰 소년은 없다.
No other boy in the class taller is than he is
> **정답** No / other / boy / in / the / class / is / taller / than / he / is

---

**17.** 학교에서 그녀만큼 똑똑한 학생은 없다.
No other student in the school as is smart as she is
> **정답** No / other / student / in / the / school / is / as / smart / as / she / is

---

**18.** 이 정원에서 이것만큼 아름다운 꽃은 없다.
No other flower in the garden as is beautiful as this one
> **정답** No / other / flower / in / the / garden / is / as / beautiful / as / this / one

---

**19.** 팀에서 그보다 빠른 선수는 없다.
No other player on the team is faster than he is
> **정답** No / other / player / on / the / team / is / faster / than / he / is

---

**20.** 내가 읽은 책 중 이것보다 좋은 책은 없다.
No other book I've read better is than this one
> **정답** No / other / book / I've / read / is / better / than / this / one
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 114: 원급과 비교급 이용한 최상급 표현 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
Nothing is _________________ than health.
Another word, nothing is as ____________________
as health.
more important - important
more important - more important
important - important
important - more important
> **정답** more important - important

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
Nobody ever loved me _________________ than Tom
did.
Another word, nobody loved me as
____________________ as Tom did.
more - most
more - the most
most - much
more - much
> **정답** more - much

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
His room is __________________ than any other
room in this house.
That is, no room is as __________________ as his
room.
bigger - bigger
biggest - big
bigger - big
bigger - biggest
> **정답** bigger - big

---

**04.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Tom's grade was higher than anyone else's.
Her cooking skill is better than any other
family member.
To me, my daughter is as prettier as any other
girl.
Nothing tastes better than chocolate in the
world.
> **정답** To me, my daughter is as prettier as any other girl.

---

**05.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I love her more as any other person in my life.
He is kinder than any other kid in this
neighborhood.
Nothing is as important as happiness in life.
My sister is taller than any other player on the
team.
> **정답** I love her more as any other person in my life.

---

**06.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그의 아이디어는 우리 반 다른 학생의 아이디어보다 더
훌륭했다.
His idea was excellenter than any other
student in our class.
His idea was as more excellent as any other
student in our class.
His idea was more excellent than any other
student in our class.
His idea was as excellent than any other
student in our class.
> **정답** His idea was more excellent than any other student
in our class.

---

**07.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
침대 위에 누워 있는 것보다 더 느긋한 것은 없다.
Nothing is as more relaxing as lying on a bed.
Nothing is more relaxing than lying on a bed.
Nothing is as relaxing than lying on a bed.
Nothing is the most relaxing than lying on a
bed.
> **정답** Nothing is more relaxing than lying on a bed.

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Amy는 그 팀에서 누구보다 부지런하다.
Amy is most hardworking than anyone on
the team.
Amy is more hardworking than anyone on
the team.
Amy is the more hardworking than anyone
on the team.
Amy is as hardworking as anyone on the
team.
> **정답** Amy is more hardworking than anyone on the
team.

---

**09.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
Nobody is as important as my parents in the
world.
Tom is as kinder as anyone else in this group.
Nothing is more dangerous as driving without
a seat belt.
She is most cleverest student in our class.
> **정답** Nobody is as important as my parents in the world.

---

**10.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
Tom's book is the more boring than our
books.
Amy's dress was more colorful than anyone
else's at the party.
Nothing is as cheaper as this pen in this room.
English is the most difficult subject than any
other subject.
> **정답** Amy's dress was more colorful than anyone else's at
the party.

---

**11.** 다음 <보기>의 문장과 뜻이 같은 문장을 모두 고르시오.
(2개)
<보기> Tom is the fastest runner in the school.
Tom is faster than any other runner in the
school.
Tom is not faster than any other runner in the
school.
No other runner in the school as faster than
Tom.
No other runner in the school is faster than
Tom.
> **정답** No other runner in the school is faster than Tom.,
Tom is faster than any other runner in the school.

---

**12.** 다음 <보기>의 문장과 뜻이 같은 문장을 모두 고르시오.
(2개)
<보기> To students, learning is the most important
thing in their lives.
To students, learning is less important than
anything else in their lives.
To students, nothing is more important than
learning in their lives.
To students, nothing is as important as
learning in their lives.
To students, nothing is as important than
learning in their lives.
> **정답** To students, nothing is as important as learning in
their lives., To students, nothing is more important
than learning in their lives.

---

**13.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
This room is biggest than all the other rooms
in this house.
Nothing is more comfortable than this
armchair.
Nobody is as polite as Tom on the team.
No book is boring than any other book in this
library.
> **정답** This room is biggest than all the other rooms in this
house., No book is boring than any other book in this
library.

---

**14.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Amy is as talkative than any other kid in the
classroom.
Food is more essential as anything else in the
world.
Nothing is as meaningful as helping others.
This bag is more expensive than all the bags in
this store.
> **정답** Amy is as talkative than any other kid in the
classroom., Food is more essential as anything else
in the world.

---

**15.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 옳은 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Today, the soup is hotter than any other day.
Tom is more handsom as any other boy in
the group.
No one drinks coffee more often than my
father in my family.
Spanish is the more difficult language I ever
learned.
> **정답** Today, the soup is hotter than any other day., No
one drinks coffee more often than my father in my
family.

---

**16.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I can play tennis better than
any other players in my
school.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** players → player

---

**17.** 문장에서 틀린부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐 쓰세요.
Amy completed her homework
earlier than all the other
student in her class.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** student → students

---

**18.** 문장에서 틀린부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐 쓰세요.
Nothing is as simpler as saying
"Sorry" when you are wrong.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** simpler → simple

---

**19.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
[2개]
Among my friends, I like Amy
more than any other friend. Nobody is
as kind as her. And
Amy is sweeter than
all other student in our school.
She is also very smart. She is smartest
student of all.
> **정답** more than, as kind as, all the other students (any
other student), the smartest

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
[2개]
I think Math is the most difficult
subject. No subject is
as harder as Math. Nobody
is worse than me in Math class. But I am
good at English. Nobody is good than me in
English class. English is the easiest subject
for me.
> **정답** the most difficult, as hard as, worse than, better, the
easiest
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 114 원급과 비교급 이용한 최상급 표현중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 다음 두 문장이 같은 뜻이 되도록 빈 칸에 알맞은 말을
쓰시오. (최상급 사용)
She is more famous than all the other pianists in
Korea.
She is  (     )   (     )   (     )  pianist in Korea.
정답 the, most, famous

---

**02.** 다음 두 문장이 같은 뜻이 되도록 빈 칸에 알맞은 말을
쓰시오. (원급 사용)
Jeniffer is the smartest student in this school.
No  (     )   (     )  is  (     )   (     )   (     )  Jeniffer
in this school.
정답 other, student, as, smart, as

---

**03.** 우리 말에 맞게 주어진 말을 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
(비교급 사용)
이 당근 케익은 이 빵가게에 있는 다른 어떤 디저트 보다 더
맛있다.
힌트 (     ) delicious, any, dessert
This carrot cake is  (     )   (     )   (     )  
  (     )  in this bakery.
정답 more, delicious, than, any, other, dessert

---

**04.** 우리 말에 맞게 주어진 말을 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
(원급 사용)
어떤 스포츠도 야구만큼 재미있지는 않다.
힌트 (     ) no, sport, fun
  (     )   (     )  is  (     )   (     )  
baseball.
정답 No, other, sport, as, fun, as

---

**05.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
미나는 이 학교의 다른 모든 학생들보다 친절하다.
힌트 (     ) than, all, kinder, the, other, students
Mina is  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
 in this school.
정답 kinder, than, all, the, other, students

---

**06.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
어떤 계획도 이것만큼 훌륭하지 않다.
힌트 (     ) no, plan, other, as, as, great
  (     )   (     )  is  (     )   (     )   (     )  this
one.
정답 No, other, plan, as, great, as

---

**07.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오. (필요시 형태를 변형할 것)
A: Who is the tallest player in your team?
B: Well, Lisa is  (     )   (     )   (     )  
player in the team. [tall, than]
정답 taller, than, any, other

---

**08.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오. (필요시 형태를 변형할 것)
A: I think Jason is very honest. Do you agree?
B: Yes, nobody is  (     )   (     )   (     )  Jason
among my friends. [as, honest]
정답 as, honest, as

---

**09.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
(비교급 사용)
우리학교에서 어떤 학생도 Tom보다 더 키가 크지는 않다.
힌트 (     ) no, student, tall
  (     )   (     )  is  (     )   (     )  Tom in my
school.
정답 No, other, student, taller, than

---

**10.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
(비교급 사용)
수학은 다른 어떤 과목보다 더 어렵다.
힌트 (     ) difficult, any, subject
Math is  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
.
정답 more, difficult, than, any, other, subject

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 114: 원급과 비교급 이용한 최상급 표현 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Nothing is _________________ than safety.
In other words, nothing is as ____________________ as safety.
more important - important more important - more important important - important important - more important
> 정답: more important - important

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Nobody ever helped me _________________ than Tom did.
In other words, nobody helped me as ____________________ as Tom did.
more - most more - the most most - much more - much
> 정답: more - much

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Her room is __________________ than any other room in this apartment.
That is, no room is as __________________ as her room.
bigger - bigger biggest - big bigger - big bigger - biggest
> 정답: bigger - big

---

**04.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Amy's grade was higher than anyone else's.
Her cooking skill is better than any other family member.
To me, my son is as prettier as any other boy.
Nothing tastes better than ice cream in the world.
> 정답: To me, my son is as prettier as any other boy.

---

**05.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I love him more as any other person in my life.
He is kinder than any other kid in this town.
Nothing is as important as friendship in life.
My brother is taller than any other player on the team.
> 정답: I love him more as any other person in my life.

---

**06.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그녀의 작품은 우리 반 다른 학생의 작품보다 더 훌륭했다.
Her work was excellenter than any other student in our class.
Her work was as more excellent as any other student in our class.
Her work was more excellent than any other student in our class.
Her work was as excellent than any other student in our class.
> 정답: Her work was more excellent than any other student

---

**07.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
소파에 누워 있는 것보다 더 편한 것은 없다.
Nothing is as more comfortable as lying on a sofa.
Nothing is more comfortable than lying on a sofa.
Nothing is as comfortable than lying on a sofa.
Nothing is the most comfortable than lying on a sofa.
> 정답: Nothing is more comfortable than lying on a sofa.

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Tom은 그 팀에서 누구보다 성실하다.
Tom is most diligent than anyone on the team.
Tom is more diligent than anyone on the team.
Tom is the more diligent than anyone on the team.
Tom is as diligent as anyone on the team.
> 정답: Tom is more diligent than anyone on the team.

---

**09.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
Nobody is as important as my family in the world.
